## wireCommitWithoutPayload() function

Creates a wire that commits a mutation to the store, but without any payload. This wire can be used in every event, as it does not have a payload type associated.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function wireCommitWithoutPayload(mutation: string): AnyWire;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  mutation | string | The full mutation path to commit. I.e. <code>x/searchBox/setQuery</code>. |

<b>Returns:</b>

[AnyWire](./x-components.anywire.md)

[AnyWire](./x-components.anywire.md) A wire that commits the mutation without any payload.
